articles.title: Austria and Algeria with dramatic qualification, Messi scores again
articles.description: Substitute Sasa Kalajdžić scored a dramatic last-gasp goal just one minute after coming on to keep Austria alive in the World Cup with a 3-3 draw with Algeria on Saturday. Both nations advanced to the knock-out stage, but in a very dramatic fashion.

articles.title: International Players Have Great Success At 2026 NHL Draft
articles.description: Ninety-six prospects from twelve different nations shattered expectations this weekend, signaling a global talent shift as European leagues and overseas development programs dominated the podium in record-breaking fashion.
